use_cases: Creating custom cursor effects for portfolio or creative websites
Building mouse-following interactive elements like buttons or tooltips
Implementing hover glow effects tied to cursor position
Adding parallax mouse-tracking animations to hero sections
Enabling custom pointer visuals for branded web experiences
ai_summary: A React MouseTrackerProvider component that captures mouse position relative to its container and exposes it via context for child components. Uses motion/react for smooth spring-based animations, enabling custom cursor implementations, hover glow effects, and mouse-following visual elements. Provides position tracking and active state to power interactive cursor-based UI patterns.
